data_description.passive_mode: Only transmit IR when you change a setting. Unchanged states are never re-sent, so the AC unit's own thermostat manages the temperature.

init.title: SmartIR options
init.description:
Update the UI-configured SmartIR entity, adjust repeat timing, or build a multi-step sequence for a selected command.

For MQTT and UFO-R11 (Moes/Tuya ZS06) IR blasters via Zigbee2MQTT, enter the `/set` topic such as `zigbee2mqtt/ufo_r11/set`. For Tuya blasters, enter a `remote.*` entity id or a JSON config. For Infrared, choose an existing Home Assistant `infrared.*` emitter entity. Native infrared receiver learning is not supported here yet.

data_description.passive_mode: Only transmit IR when you change a setting. Unchanged states are never re-sent, so the AC unit's own thermostat manages the temperature.

error.learn_failed: IR learning failed. Check the Broadlink/LinkNLink remote entity and try again.
error.controller_target_conflict: Enter a remote entity OR an MQTT topic / service name — not both.
error.required: Choose a remote entity or enter an MQTT topic / service name.
